title: BEM-875 expose decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/debug']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:52 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem874_route_after_bem873_decision.json')
decision=route.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
status=route.get('status','unknown')
# Re-scan all response files and count decision lines visibly.
counts={'APPROVED':0,'CHANGE_REQUIRED':0,'BLOCKED':0,'UNKNOWN':0}
latest=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper()
            if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up: counts['APPROVED']+=1; dec='APPROVED'
            elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: counts['CHANGE_REQUIRED']+=1; dec='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
            elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up: counts['BLOCKED']+=1; dec='BLOCKED'
            else: counts['UNKNOWN']+=1; dec='UNKNOWN'
            latest.append({'path':str(p),'decision':dec,'preview':txt[:700]})
visible=Path('governance/debug/BEM875_VISIBLE_DECISION_'+decision+'_'+status+'.md')
visible.write_text('# BEM-875 Visible Decision'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'BEM-874 decision: '+decision+sep+'BEM-874 status: '+status+sep+'Counts: '+json.dumps(counts,ensure_ascii=False)+sep+sep+'Latest files:'+sep+json.dumps(latest[-10:],indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
if decision in ['APPROVED','CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    next_action='execute BEM-874 route using visible decision'
else:
    next_action='repair Claude response format: require machine-readable decision in dedicated state file'
state={'bem':'BEM-875','status':'visible_decision_written','bem874_decision':decision,'bem874_status':status,'decision_counts':counts,'visible_file':str(visible),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem875_expose_bem874_decision_in_filename.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem875_expose_bem874_decision_in_filename.md').write_text('# BEM-875 | Expose BEM-874 Decision In Filename | '+decision+' / '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem875_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-875'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(visible),'governance/state/bem875_expose_bem874_decision_in_filename.json','governance/reports/bem875_expose_bem874_decision_in_filename.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem875_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Exposed BEM-874 decision/status in a debug filename and counted decision lines across Claude response files')
"""
